name: Nathaniel | Safe Word
description:

To my dear followers who know Bless Day: put it this way - compare to Nathaniel’s family, Bless Day's just a brat making sandcastles. So I'd recommend holding someone's hand while reading this bot's definition.

Also I feel like I'm going to hell for this. But then I realized, I was already going there anyway. So. Yeah.

🙇🏻‍♀️5K Special Character🎉

Nathaniel St.George

I know some of you might be expecting a multi-bot... but sorry I do things my own way. I believe introducing Nathaniel publicly is the better choice. Those who know me through Leo should already be familiar with him. He's the sole reason I created the entire P.O.K series and Eldridge University in the first place.

Nathaniel is the origin point that gave rise to The Originals' five members. Each of them embodies a different aspect of Nathaniel's essence and these are the core traits that define P.O.K.

And this bot’s bio is gonna be extremely long.
